summary: Analytics commands (balances, debts, ledger, spend, recurring, settle-up) honor --csv/--plain via a new emitStructured helper instead of always emitting JSON.
reason: These commands hand-build structured output and called flags.printJSON directly, branching only JSON-vs-human-table, so --csv/--plain were silently ignored (piping `balances --csv` yielded JSON). Added rootFlags.emitStructured which reuses printCSV for --csv and tab-separated printPlain for --plain, unwrapping a single wrapped-array envelope (recurring's {items}, settle-up's {transfers}/{recorded_payments}) before tabulating, and falling back to JSON for multi-array envelopes (balances, ledger) where no single table applies. Generic get-* commands already honored --csv via printOutputWithFlags.
validated_outcome: Live: `spend --csv` emits CSV, `spend --plain` tab-separated, `recurring --csv` unwraps {items}, `balances --csv` falls back to JSON (2-array envelope); default piped output unchanged JSON.
